calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-30-2009 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Oct-01-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Warren R. Webster, Esq. appeared for plaintiffs Emporium Mall, LLC and SF Centre Limited Partnership, dba Westfield San Francisco Centre.
Lara Saab, assistant general manager for plaintiff, and Grant Ericson, assistant security director for plaintiff, were placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Nelson Delgado, a natural person.
Default was entered against defendant on June 22, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed on September 17, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiffs Emporium Mall, LLC and SF Centre Limited Partnership, dba Westfield San Francisco Centre as follows:

Defendant Nelson Delgado, a natural person, is permanently enjoined from and ordeed to stay at least fifty yards away from the Westfield San Francisco Centre located at 865 Market Street, and enclosed by Mission onf 5th Streets.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-10-2009 Continued To Nov-13-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212
